business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number CP-BIP-2025-4420; form CP 00 10 10 12; deductible 75000; coinsurance 80%; producer Midwest Property & Casualty Group.

Endorsement CP 15 08 10 12; effective date 2026-03-15; pays actual loss of Business Income due to necessary suspension of operations during period of restoration, including continuing normal operating expenses and payroll.
Endorsement CP 04 05 10 12; effective date 2026-03-15; includes Coverage A for loss to undamaged portion of building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition.

Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12; effective date 2026-03-15; covers direct physical loss or damage to covered property caused by interruption of utility services, including water, communication, and power supply services.
Endorsement CP 99 30 07 88; effective date 2026-03-15; coinsurance additional condition is suspended for scheduled property during the declarations period.

Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12; effective date 2026-03-15; covers direct physical loss or damage caused by or resulting from an equipment breakdown accident to covered mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

document_info.document_type: Commercial Property Policy - Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

concerns: Large total scheduled limits: Building 146260000, Contents 42495000, and Business Income 62590000.
Operations include warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities.
positives: Business Income and Extra Expense coverage included.
Utility Services - Direct Damage endorsement included.
